name.description: Product name. Do not translate Kode Injector.

description.message: Inject JavaScript and CSS from local files into websites

language_label.description: Label for the interface language selector.

language_browser.description: Use the browser UI language automatically.

source_code.description: Link label for the project source repository.

source_code_title.message: Report an issue or view the source code
source_code_title.description: Tooltip for the project source link.

form_site_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the website hostname matched by an injection rule.

form_site_required.description: Validation message when the site hostname is empty.

form_js_path_required.message: Enter the path to a JavaScript file
form_js_path_required.description: Validation message when the local JavaScript file path is empty.

form_css_path_required.message: Enter the path to a CSS file
form_css_path_required.description: Validation message when the local CSS file path is empty.

form_add_injection.description: Button that creates an injection rule.

table_site.description: Injection table column for the matched website.

table_js_path.description: Injection table column for a local JavaScript file.

table_css_path.description: Injection table column for a local CSS file.

table_empty.description: Empty state shown when no injection rules exist.

injection_disable.description: Tooltip for disabling one injection rule.

injection_enable.description: Tooltip for enabling one injection rule.

injection_remove.description: Tooltip for deleting one injection rule.

injection_remove_confirm.message: This injection will be removed permanently. Are you sure?
injection_remove_confirm.description: Confirmation before permanently deleting an injection rule.

popup_pause_all.description: Tooltip for globally pausing Kode Injector.

popup_enable_all.description: Tooltip for globally enabling Kode Injector.

popup_open_settings.description: Tooltip for opening the options page.

popup_no_injections.description: Popup state when the current site has no enabled injection rules.

popup_disable_site.description: Tooltip for disabling all injection rules on the current site.

popup_enable_site.description: Tooltip for enabling injection rules on the current site.

popup_report_issue_title.description: Tooltip for the issue reporting action.

popup_report_issue.description: Button label for reporting a problem.

native_host_required_title.description: Warning title shown when the native helper is unavailable.

native_host_explanation.message: Kode Injector Helper reads local injection files for Firefox, Chrome, and Edge.
native_host_explanation.description: Explains why the native helper is required.

native_host_read_only.message: Kode Injector Helper is read-only: it cannot write files, execute programs, list directories, or access the network.
native_host_read_only.description: Explains the native helper security boundary.

native_host_status_not_installed.message: Kode Injector Helper is not installed or is not registered for this browser.

native_host_status_update_required.message: Kode Injector Helper must be updated.

native_host_status_disconnected.message: Kode Injector Helper disconnected. Check again to reconnect.

native_host_status_read_failed.message: Kode Injector Helper could not read a configured file.

native_host_install_instructions.message: Download and install Kode Injector Helper for your operating system, then return here and check again.

popup_native_host_unavailable.message: Local file injection needs Kode Injector Helper. Open settings for installation or recovery instructions.
popup_native_host_unavailable.description: Compact popup warning when the native helper is unavailable.

native_helper_download_or_update.message: Download or update Kode Injector Helper
native_helper_download_or_update.description: Action that downloads the matching Kode Injector Helper package.

native_helper_view_all_downloads.description: Action that opens all available Kode Injector Helper downloads.

native_helper_download_unsupported.message: A download could not be selected automatically for this system. Choose one from all downloads.
native_helper_download_unsupported.description: Guidance shown when the current operating system or architecture has no direct download mapping.

native_helper_target_macos_apple_silicon.message: Kode Injector Helper for macOS (Apple silicon)
native_helper_target_macos_apple_silicon.description: Label for the Apple silicon macOS helper package.

native_helper_target_macos_intel.description: Label for the Intel macOS helper package.

native_helper_target_windows_arm64.description: Label for the ARM64 Windows helper package.

native_helper_target_windows_x86_64.description: Label for the x86-64 Windows helper package.

native_helper_target_linux_arm64.description: Label for the ARM64 Linux helper package.

native_helper_target_linux_x86_64.description: Label for the x86-64 Linux helper package.

file_access_disabled.description: Warning title shown when the browser denies access to local file URLs.

file_access_instructions.message: Open your browser's extension settings for Kode Injector and enable Access local files on your computer or Allow access to file URLs, then check again.
file_access_instructions.description: Instructions for enabling browser permission to read local injection files.

file_access_open_extension_settings.description: Button that opens the browser-managed settings for Kode Injector.

file_access_check_again.description: Button that rechecks browser local-file permission.

popup_file_access_disabled.message: Local file access is disabled. Open settings for instructions.
popup_file_access_disabled.description: Compact popup warning when local injection files cannot be read.

local_source_method.description: Label for choosing how local injection files are read.

local_source_method_browser.description: Option that reads local files through browser file-URL access.

local_source_method_browser_description.message: Reads local files directly through the browser and requires its file-URL access toggle to be enabled.
local_source_method_browser_description.description: Explains the browser-managed local-file access method.

local_source_method_native_host.description: Option that reads local files through the separately installed native helper.

native_host_permission_denied.message: Native Host permission was not granted. The current file access method was not changed.
native_host_permission_denied.description: Shown when a Chromium nativeMessaging permission request is declined.

local_source_method_native_host_descript.message: Uses a separately installed read-only helper and avoids the browser's file-URL access toggle. Selecting it requests the optional Native Host permission from the browser.
local_source_method_native_host_descript.description: Explains the optional Native Host method, its advantage, and its permission request.

local_source_method_change_failed.message: Could not change the local file access method. Try again.
local_source_method_change_failed.description: Shown when saving a local-file access method fails.

native_host_permission_required.message: Native Host is selected, but its browser permission is not enabled.
native_host_permission_required.description: Warning shown when Native Host is selected without its browser permission.

native_host_enable_permission.description: Button requesting the optional Chromium nativeMessaging permission.
